{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Herald of the green dragons
| introduced = cradle-08-wintersteel
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of the green dragons]] is the right hand of the [[Dragon King]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11">''Wintersteel'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Herald of the green dragons]] practices a [[Path]] of water and [[life]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c11" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
